debug_info.goal:
case zero
n : ℕ
pSpec : ProtocolSpec n
ι : Type
oSpec : OracleSpec ι
OuterStmtIn OuterWitIn OuterStmtOut OuterWitOut InnerStmtIn InnerWitIn InnerStmtOut InnerWitOut : Type
lens : Context.Lens OuterStmtIn OuterStmtOut InnerStmtIn InnerStmtOut OuterWitIn OuterWitOut InnerWitIn InnerWitOut
outerStmtIn : OuterStmtIn
outerWitIn : OuterWitIn
P : Prover oSpec InnerStmtIn InnerWitIn InnerStmtOut InnerWitOut pSpec
⊢ ((simulateQ loggingOracle).toFun (Transcript 0 pSpec × P.PrvState 0 × OuterStmtIn × OuterWitIn)
        (runToRound 0 outerStmtIn outerWitIn
          { PrvState := fun i => P.PrvState i × OuterStmtIn × OuterWitIn,
            input := fun ctxIn => (P.input (lens.proj ctxIn), ctxIn),
            sendMessage := fun i x => do
              let __discr ← P.sendMessage i x.1
              pure (__discr.1, __discr.2, x.2.1, x.2.2),
            receiveChallenge := fun i x => do
              let f ← P.receiveChallenge i x.1
              pure fun chal => (f chal, x.2.1, x.2.2),
            output := fun x => do
              let __discr ← P.output x.1
              pure (lens.lift (x.2.1, x.2.2) (__discr.1, __discr.2)) })).run =
    (fun a => ((a.1.1, a.1.2, outerStmtIn, outerWitIn), a.2)) <$>
      ((simulateQ loggingOracle).toFun (Transcript 0 pSpec × P.PrvState 0)
          (runToRound 0 (lens.stmt.toFunA outerStmtIn) (lens.wit.toFunA (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn)) P)).run
